Title: Verify Connection Spinner Display During Launch and Reconnection

Step Action: Click the eNcounter/Clearsteth desktop icon to launch application
Step Expected: Application begins loading
Spinner is visible while system is attempting to connect
Initial connection attempt fails
Spinner continues displaying while system attempts to reconnect
Spinner stays visible throughout all reconnection attempts

Title: Verify Connection Retry Timing and Duration

Step Action: Launch application by clicking desktop icon
Step Expected: Application starts loading
Initial connection attempt does not connect
System retries connection every 1 second
Each retry occurs precisely 1 second after the previous attempt
System continues retry attempts for exactly 20 seconds

Step Action: Verify system stops retrying after 20 seconds
Step Expected: System stops attempting to connect after 20-second period

Step Action: Launch application by clicking desktop icon
Step Expected: Application starts loading
Connection fails for 20 seconds

Step Action: Verify system stops retrying after 20 seconds
Step Expected: System stops attempting to connect after exactly 20 seconds
Error message is displayed after 20 seconds of failed attempts
Error message reads "Connection Failed, please contact your system administrator"

Title: Verify Connection Success During Retry Period

Step Action: Launch application by clicking desktop icon
Step Expected: Application starts loading
Initial connection attempt does not connect
System displays spinner and retries every 1 second
Connection succeeds during retry period (e.g. at 10 seconds)
Application completes loading and user can access functionality
Spinner is no longer visible after successful connection
